contentNote: Menu item names, promotion names, and supplier names are stored in your catalog and display as entered.

accounting.title: Accounting & Financial Reports
accounting.subtitle: Chart of accounts, journal entries, ledger and financial statements.
accounting.financialStatementRestricted: Financial statement reports require both accounting.manage and reports.view permissions.

journal.title: Journal Entries
journal.needTwoAccounts: Create at least two accounts in Chart of Accounts first

health.title: Accounting Health
health.noSnapshotData: No snapshot data yet. Daily snapshots run via accounting:health-snapshot.
health.revenuePostingHint: Only one revenue posting path is active. Realtime posts on payment; Shift Close posts during shift close.

posting.incompleteRules: Complete all required rules before saving
posting.incompleteBannerBody: {{count}} required rule(s) are not configured. Journals for this module will fail until all rules are set.
posting.procurementSectionHint: Map chart accounts used when GRN, supplier invoices, and payments are posted to the general ledger.
posting.posSectionHint: Map chart accounts for sales revenue, COGS, gift card issue/redemption/breakage, cash variance, and payment settlement.
posting.payrollSectionHint: Map chart accounts for payroll expense, payables, and deduction recoveries when a payroll run is posted.
posting.inventorySectionHint: Map chart accounts for inventory asset and counter accounts used when adjustments and waste are posted.
posting.empty: No rules available for this module.
posting.bankOverridesHint: Optional per-bank GL credit account. When empty, the default payment bank rule is used.
posting.noBanks: No bank accounts configured. Add banks in Settings.
posting.paymentOverridesHint: Optional per payment-method GL debit account. When empty, the settlement-type default rule is used (cash, card, QRIS, etc.).
posting.paymentOverridesOutletRequired: Select an outlet scope to configure per-method payment overrides.
posting.noPaymentMethods: No outlet payment methods found. Configure payment methods in Settings.

rules.pos.gift_card.issue.store_credit: Gift card issue — store credit liability (credit)

shiftAssignments.subtitle: Assign shift templates to employees for a date range.

scheduling.title: Scheduling
scheduling.subtitle: Weekly roster board — assignments are defaults only.
scheduling.generateHint: Creates draft roster rows from active shift assignments (SHIFT-01). Skips existing days unless overwrite is enabled.
scheduling.copyHint: Duplicate roster rows to another period (same span length).

attendanceReview.title: Attendance Review
attendanceReview.subtitle: Daily summaries, exceptions, and read-only payroll preparation metrics.
attendanceReview.periodsHint: Periods are created from Payroll Preparation. Approve attendance here before generating snapshots.
attendanceReview.periodDeleteConfirm: Delete period {{period}}? This cannot be undone.
attendanceReview.emptySummaries: No summaries for this period. Run attendance:generate-summaries or wait for the daily job.
attendanceReview.noPeriodForRange: No attendance period for selected range
attendanceReview.emptyPrep: No preparation data for this period
attendanceReview.prepReadOnlyHint: Read-only metrics for future payroll runs. No deductions or payroll generation in this phase.

overtime.title: Overtime

preparation.reviewRequiredCount: {{count}} employee(s) require review before payroll processing.

accounting-reconciliation.description: Subledger vs GL tie-out for AP, procurement, payroll, and gift cards.

operations-monitoring.title: Operations Monitoring

reservation-analytics.description: Reservation volume, occupancy, and operational dashboard metrics.

payment-health.title: Payment Health

audit-center.title: Audit Center
audit-center.description: Centralized compliance timeline — operational, financial, and forensic change history.

system-health-center.title: System Health Center
system-health-center.description: Unified platform health score, incidents, reliability trends, and priority action queue.

bug-reports.title: Bug Reports

system-reliability.title: System Reliability
system-reliability.description: Queue failure monitoring, critical job alerts, and background job health trends.

shift-close-operations.title: Shift Close Operations
shift-close-operations.description: End-of-shift preflight, cash reconciliation, inventory posting, and GL batch close.

loyalty-analytics.description: Member engagement, voucher performance, and loyalty program trends.

procurement-analytics.title: Procurement Analytics
procurement-analytics.description: Supplier performance, spend trends, and payables inside Purchases.

inventory-analytics.title: Inventory Analytics
inventory-analytics.description: Valuation, stock risk, dead-stock signals, and menu intelligence KPIs.
